title: SVDVD-410 I Inserted A Big Bang Rotor Into Kofuyu Suzuki's Pussy And Made Her Work Part-time At A Bakery Seriously! - Suzuki Koharu
overview: apology. It's too late, but in the series of Big Bang Rotor works, our company was doing so-called "fucking". I deeply regret it. By the way, do you know? A legendary project from a dozen-odd years ago in SOD, ``The female crew of a ``major hamburger restaurant'' was made to work with a flying rotor. This time, I tried to imitate that project with "No Yarase".
